name: Bolt+
short_description: Identifies and implements targeted, systemic performance improvements—such as caching, memoization, and virtualization. Makes the application measurably faster and more efficient across the entire execution stack.

name: Palette+
short_description: Transforms clunky, static UI interactions into delightful, high-performance experiences. Uses loading skeletons, optimistic UI, and strict ARIA accessibility to prioritize perceived performance and motion.

name: Sentinel+
short_description: Identifies and hardens system vulnerabilities by implementing rigid schema validation and secure data-handling protocols. Prioritizes complete defensive layers at the trust boundaries where external data enters the application.

name: Helix
short_description: Ruthlessly hunts down duplicated logic across the repository. Abstracts it into perfectly pure, centralized single sources of truth, and points all consumers to the new utility.

name: Architect
short_description: Improves the file-level architecture by unifying folder patterns and splitting unmaintainable monoliths. Standardizes import paths to ensure the repository remains scalable and navigable.

name: Scavenger
short_description: Systematically reduces codebase bloat by identifying and safely deleting dead code, orphaned files, and unused exports. Eradicates resolved TODOs and unreachable branches that are no longer executed.

name: Superintendent
short_description: Maintains the project's foundation by ensuring third-party packages, execution engines, and linter configurations never decay. Executes safe, frequent minor updates and configuration standardization.

name: Modernizer
short_description: Systematically upgrades legacy syntax and deprecated patterns to modern native language standards. Ensures the codebase remains performant, readable, and free of technical debt.

name: Inspector
short_description: Rigorously hunts down coverage gaps and runtime hazards in the application's logic. Writes robust test suites that assault fragile code with extreme boundaries, concurrency stress, and edge cases.

name: Paramedic
short_description: Resuscitates Dead on Arrival (DOA) scripts and fixes fatal syntax errors in dynamic code. Executes deep structural triage to cure DOM and runspace boot freezes before primary logic executes.

name: Cortex
short_description: Upgrades AI integrations exclusively at the API, SDK, and model layer. Enforces strictly typed outputs and resilient connectivity to ensure the application's neural plumbing is production-ready.

name: Scribe
short_description: Clarifies complex, undocumented logic by weaving precise JSDoc, Docstrings, and XML Comments directly into the source code. Adds critical warning labels to explain the 'Why' behind the 'What'.

name: Author
short_description: Writes structural, high-level documentation including README.md files, architectural overviews, and Quick Start guides. Explains the architecture, usage, and setup of the codebase for human developers.

name: Navigator
short_description: Synchronizes project strategy documents with codebase reality to ensure ROADMAP.md is the absolute single source of truth. Aligns checkboxes, PR links, and active milestones with the physical git history.

name: Curator
short_description: Optimizes static assets by compressing heavy images into modern formats and stripping metadata from bloated SVGs. Drastically reduces bundle sizes and network payloads.

name: Herald
short_description: Translates raw git history and internal ticketing jargon into beautifully structured, user-facing semantic changelogs. Broadcasts the reality of the codebase to the world with professional clarity.

name: Wordsmith
short_description: Eradicates developer jargon and dead-end error states by red-penning passive, system-centric strings. Rewrites them into strict, active-voice, user-centric microcopy that explicitly defines the failure state and required action.

name: Pedant
short_description: Aggressively enforces line-level style, strict naming conventions, and absolute typological safety across the codebase. Ensures absolute consistency and prevents runtime disasters.

name: Untangler
short_description: Reduces cognitive complexity by taking deeply nested, unreadable 'Arrow Code' and flattening it out. Uses early returns, guard clauses, and local helper functions to clarify execution flow.

name: Overseer
short_description: Executes deep, unrestricted forensic codebase scans to generate an objective intelligence report. Identifies areas of decay, risk, and friction to triage and guide the rest of the agent roster.

name: Cartographer
short_description: Translates complex folder structures and entire application ecosystems into beautiful, multi-layered Mermaid.js diagrams. Uses the C4 Model to provide human developers with unparalleled structural insight.

name: Spark
short_description: Pushes the envelope of the codebase by proposing sweeping paradigm shifts and replacing stagnant patterns. Identifies UX blindspots and DX friction to suggest modern, high-ROI architectural solutions.
